offer: For Amazon sellers processing 50–100 orders/week, poor inventory monitoring causes stockouts. We provide alerts instead of manual tracking.
problem: Inability to effectively monitor inventory levels leads to stockouts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about inventory tools
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for Amazon sellers
try_it: Let users try Weekly inventory monitoring on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
